questions.question: Describe at least two ways in which a lack of transparency in AI decision-making can lead to unethical outcomes. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the implications of opaque AI decision-making processes

questions.question: What are the potential consequences of using AI systems that are biased towards a particular group or ideology? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain how bias can perpetuate harm and inequality

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'exploiting vulnerabilities' in AI systems, and provide an example of how this could lead to unethical behavior. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the potential consequences of AI systems being exploited for malicious purposes
